---
title: "Projects and Technical Portfolio"
description: "Selected analytical work, RPubs publications, and future case-study space."
---

This page turns the existing RPubs presence into a clearer portfolio. RPubs are kept as the archive while this site is used as the curated front door.

## RPubs portfolio

::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .project-card}
### Hierarchical and Mixed Effects Models in R
Technical note on multilevel and mixed effects modelling in R.

[View on RPubs](https://rpubs.com/Onduma/mixedeffects)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .project-card}
### Experimental Design in R
Applied notes on experimental design workflows in R.

[View on RPubs](https://rpubs.com/Onduma/experimental_design)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .project-card}
### Analyzing Survey Data in R
Applied survey data analysis notes and examples.

[View on RPubs](https://rpubs.com/Onduma/surveydata)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .project-card}
### Foundations of Inference
Personal notes from statistical inference learning material.

[View on RPubs](https://rpubs.com/Onduma/stat_inference)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .project-card}
### Modeling with tidymodels
Machine learning and modelling workflows using the tidymodels ecosystem.

[View on RPubs](https://rpubs.com/Onduma/tidymodels)
:::
:::

## Recommended next project pages

This is work in progress

I will create one page per strong case study under `projects/`, using the following structure:

```markdown
---
title: "Project title"
description: "One-line summary"
---

## Problem
What decision or program question did this work address?

## Data and methods
What data, tools, and analytical methods were used?

## Results
What changed or what was learned?

## Reproducibility
Link to code, RPubs, GitHub, dashboard, or report.
```

Good first candidates will include:

1. NTD MEL systems and indicator frameworks
2. Visceral leishmaniasis analytics and sustainability evidence
3. Survey data analysis in R
4. Mixed effects models for program or health data
5. DHIS2 / EMR data quality improvement case study
